title: More Nonsense Limerick 20
content:
There was an old person of Wick,
    Who said, "Tick-a-Tick, Tick-a-Tick;
    Chickabee, Chickabaw." 
    And he said nothing more,
    That laconic old person of Wick.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 20", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
